allow: Bash(psql -U postgres -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='company_erp';")
PowerShell(psql -U postgres -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='company_erp';" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -c "SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datname='company_erp';" 2>&1)

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@company.com","password":"admin123"}'; $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $res.accessToken; Write-Host "Token alındı"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/employees" -Method GET -Headers $headers | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($pid = \(netstat -ano | findstr ":5000 " | findstr "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; Write-Host "PID $pid durduruldu" } else { Write-Host "Port 5000 zaten boş" })

PowerShell($processId = \(netstat -ano | findstr ":5000 " | findstr "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); if \($processId\) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force; Write-Host "PID $processId durduruldu" } else { Write-Host "Port 5000 zaten bos" })
